title: Evidence Node
description: One node in the Track B translational evidence graph. Nodes are variants, genes, pathways, drugs, trials, diseases and Track A topics. Deterministic x/y layout coordinates are carried so the explorer needs no in-browser layout.

score.description: Primary headline score for the node (interpretation depends on node_type), used for sizing/sorting; may be null.

x.description: Deterministic layout x coordinate, normalised to roughly 0..1000.

y.description: Deterministic layout y coordinate, normalised to roughly 0..1000.

scores.description: Bag of secondary scores carried for explainability (e.g. genetic_support, functional_support, translation_gap).

disease_groups.description: Controlled disease dimensions this node spans (alzheimer, vascular_dementia, frontotemporal_dementia, lewy_body_dementia, mixed_dementia, dementia_unspecified, other).

provenance.description: Where this node came from and any supporting facts (source ids, counts, best p_value, statuses, etc.).
